title: Food Coma: More Foods
description: A minecraft forge mod for minecraft version 1.20.1 which adds more foods to the game. Try out the new foods!
body:
Tired of the same old Minecraft diet? Food Coma: More Foods brings a delicious variety of crops, ingredients, and meals to enhance your survival experience!

🌱 Grow Your Own Farm: Plant and harvest new crops like Cucumber, Tomato, and Lettuce to create fresh recipes.

🔍 Find Hidden Seeds: Use the Seed Seeker tool to discover rare seeds hidden in the soil and expand your farm.

🍔 Cook & Feast: Craft exciting new foods such as Tacos, Chicken Patties, Sausages, and French Fries to satisfy your hunger and keep you energized on your adventures.

🌎 Immersive Survival: From harvesting to cooking, enjoy a deeper and more realistic food system that brings variety to your meals.

🔥 Craft, Cook, and Conquer! Whether you're exploring caves or building empires, Food Coma: More Foods ensures you never go hungry again!

🍽️ Bon Appétit, Minecrafters!
